scripts.scrape:local: tsx -e "import { scrapeAvailability } from './src/scraper.ts'; (async () => { const started = Date.now(); const snapshot = await scrapeAvailability(); const available = snapshot.slots.filter((slot) => slot.available); console.log(JSON.stringify({ elapsedMs: Date.now() - started, checkedAt: snapshot.checkedAt, ok: snapshot.ok, parks: snapshot.parks.length, facilities: snapshot.facilities.length, slots: snapshot.slots.length, availableSlots: available.length, errors: snapshot.errors.length, firstErrors: snapshot.errors.slice(0, 10) }, null, 2)); })().catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); });"
